about the book

noise, silence,
and the space between

a story about two people finding each other through silence, about the music that returns when we stop running from ourselves, and about the step it takes to move beyond the horizon we've drawn around our own lives.

read the full book →
prologue

the one who learns to enjoy the waiting
won't have to wait for enjoyment.

act I

he sat among the plants.

the city roared. dissolved. the noise lived inside him. vibrated under his skin. filled the pauses with breath.

The Watcher: — when you stopped listening.

The Whisper: — when you became afraid of silence.

he looked at the leaves. More alive than thoughts. a vein — a trace, leading to a music he once knew.

noise — a shadow.

the longer you look, the less you see.

a crack appeared in the air. recognition seeped through it. each felt they had long been carrying the other within.

The Whisper: — the noise is becoming music. again

continue reading →
act II

the house by the river was a whole universe.

no borders: the song of the world blended with the breath of the wind. Lew's voice merged with the cries of birds. everything — part of a single melody. there was no beginning and no end.

morning brought certainty — the world loved him. he could watch dragonflies for hours. watch the water swallow a thrown stone. everything — part of a great harmony.

still. he believed.

he wakes in an unfamiliar room. white sheets carry someone else's perfume. and… something sweet… too sweet — the scent of someone else's presence.

The Whisper: — it's time to stop.

act III

— you won't like what you're about to hear,

but this is how i see you.

she exhaled. slowly. afraid to disturb the air: — deep down, you really want. to do. something. so much it hurts. you come closer — and get disappointed. in yourself. because you can't. express it. at all.

he didn't answer. lowered his gaze. something trembled. recognition. quiet. unpleasant. an echo of a voice he had muted for too long.

not analysis. a mirror.
silence is not emptiness. silence is possibility.

act IV

morning smelled of ash and fresh bread.

they stood in the garden. the earth was intoxicated. the leaves shimmered — newly born.

— our differences are not the end of the world. i'm not pushing you away. even if you did something wrong — it doesn't mean you'll be punished.

he stayed silent for a long time:

— i reject certain behavior. and the ways i'm treated. but i never reject you.

a point of silence. inside, growth had already begun.

act V

it came like an unexpected guest

a short line. a cut-off breath: "Noah is no more."

the world stopped. impossible to hold it. the letters blurred into a gray stain. someone turned the sound off. in a room where life once played. the thread snapped.

Noah. always a step ahead. laughing. laughter — a form of prayer. every meeting like returning home — where you could be alive. understood. accepted. without explanation.

act VI

for a long time, it wasn't clear where exactly it hurt.

noise in the body. fatigue. endless resistance. everything merged into a hum. in the morning moment. without flashes, without drama — everything became simple.

not easy. no. simple.

—— i'm tired of not being. myself.

she slowly wrapped her arms around her shoulders. so simple — so much. to allow. the body. to feel. it is a home. she is a temple.

today, it is enough that she stands — here. herself. with god. soft. grounded. light.

epilogue

morning unfolded in two

two lines of light — parallel, moving in one breath.

she woke before the sun. quietly. afraid to disturb the stillness between worlds. the unseen whispered: — you can just be.

he walked along the embankment. the wind tugged at his coat collar, the water rolled the light. he was no longer searching. he was allowing — the river, the sky, the path.

somewhere, she is taking a step too — and that is enough.

from the book

fragments

"two abysses finding each other through silence."
exhale
"the noise is becoming music. again."
inhale
"silence has become an island — we can simply be. no explanations, no expectations."
exhale
"peace is in allowing yourself to be a wave. a wave that remembers — its heart rests in the depths of the ocean's endless calm."
exhale
"attraction is a form of prayer."
exhale
"compassion doesn't hold things together. it simply doesn't destroy."
shadows
"to leave is the same as to stay."
light
"love is still here. it just breathes differently."
epilogue
dedicated to egor angeleon holos

he showed by example —

anything is possible. anyone can do it.
